name: Creamed Chicken and Leeks (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 2 whole chicken breasts, bone with skin on
a few parsley sprigs, tied in cheesecloth
salt and freshly ground white pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a saucepan until foaming subsides but before it gets brown.
2. Add the leeks and celery, along with 1/4 cup of chicken broth. Cover and simmer over low heat for 5 minutes; do not let it get brown.
3. Add the chicken (skin side up) and bouquet garni to the pot, using enough broth to just cover the chicken. Cover and simmer over very low heat for 30 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
4. Remove the chicken from the broth and discard the skin and bones. Also remove and discard the bouquet garni.
5. Puree the liquid through a food mill and return it to the saucepan. Add the remaining broth and boil down until reduced to about 4 cups. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Add the lemon juice to the chicken and place in a microwavable dish.
7. Blend the egg yolks and cream together. Slowly ladle 1 cup of hot broth into the mixture, then return it to the soup and bring to a gentle simmer to thicken.
8. Reheat the chicken for a minute in the microwave oven and serve among 4 soup plates. Ladle the thickened broth over the chicken and garnish with parsley. Serve over boiled potatoes or with bread.
Yield: 4 servings
